TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-flood_waon a boong

S.FORM: kakhayza'an tatini' pa'alowa' ka minayhael.
S.TRANSL: 從前，祖先告訴他們的子女，
Once upon a time, our ancestors told their descendants ...

S.FORM: mita' oemaeh ray horok.
S.TRANSL: 我們山上的地，
In our flatland in the mountain,

S.FORM: mwa:i' ila 'aehae' mae'iyaeh rima' mayaka:i' ka(no) 'ima haebae:an koSa: paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人來跟大家說，要造一艘船。
There came a man who told the people to build a boat.

S.FORM: 'ima haebae'an mae'iyaeh toe'aewhay ka ka:i'.
S.TRANSL: 大家都不聽他的話。
The people did not listen to him.

S.FORM: rima' kalkalsiri' ka mae'iyaeh sa'sa'i:in 'aehae' taew'an koSa: paskayzaeh ka palono'.
S.TRANSL: 他走到各家，吩咐他們要造船。
He went around and told each family to build a boat.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay paka:i' saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 沒有人聽他的話。
Nobody paid attention to him.

S.FORM: koSa'en So: moyo kay paka:i' hini nila 'oemaeh 'am hinaw ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們若不相信，他們的地都會沈下去。
He said that if they didn't believe, their land will sink.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh 'okay paka:i' saboeh 'aehae' taew'an 'ima paka:i'.
S.TRANSL: 除了一個家庭之外，沒有人相信他。
Everybody did not believe him, except for one family.

S.FORM: kalahaengen noka noka koSa'en ka 'ima hara:i' mae'iyaeh isaa 'ima hara:i' ma rima' ka samiyan.
S.TRANSL: 神會保護相信他的人。
The gods will protect those who believe.

S.FORM: o: sizaeh 'ima paka:i' mae'iyaeh paskayzaeh ila ka palono'.
S.TRANSL: 有一家人聽完那人的話，就相信他，開始造船。
After the dirty person, who is a god, convinced the family, they believed and started to build a boat.

S.FORM: paskayzaeh hini mwahil yo: sobaoeh.
S.TRANSL: 船寬又大。
The boat was wide and big.

S.FORM: hoenaehngewa 'atomal 'am paskayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 造船需要很長的時間。
It took a long time to build the boat.

S.FORM: kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh.
S.TRANSL: 船做完以後，
Finally, the boat was completed.

S.FORM: samiyan mwa:i' ila kita'.
S.TRANSL: 神就來看看。
And the god came to see it.

S.FORM: koSa: kayzaeh ila paskayzaeh niSo' ka palono.
S.TRANSL: 他說，你們的船造好了。
And said, your boat has been finished.

S.FORM: o: So: kayzaeh ila.
S.TRANSL: 如果做好了，
If it has been finished,

S.FORM: So: noka hiza samiyan ka 'ima hara:i' sin'olan si'leb kasinpanan.
S.TRANSL: 外表骯髒的神就把所有的動物叫進船裡。
The god, the man with dirty appearance, (called and) kept the animals inside.

S.FORM: sinpanan mwa:i' ila saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 所有的動物都來了。
All the animals came.

S.FORM: palono' kayzaeh ila nisia.
S.TRANSL: 他的船造好了。
His boat was finished.

S.FORM: 'a'apolon ila.
S.TRANSL: 分配了位子給他們。
They were assigned spaces.

S.FORM: ka si'oe'oe ila kasinpanan si'leb ila ray 'aehae' kas kaa'leban.
S.TRANSL: 所有的動物叫去關在房間裡面。
They were called and kept in a room.

S.FORM: ka pazay ma' nonak ralom ma' nonak 'ahoe' ma' nonak mae'iyaeh ma' nonak.
S.TRANSL: 有地方放米，有地方放水，有地方放狗，每個人都有各自的地方。
There was room for putting the rice and water, as well as for the animals and the family members.

S.FORM: pak'isaza pakas'aboeen ka sinpanan maybi:il ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.TRANSL: 動物先帶進船內；人最後進去。
The animals were brought first into the boat. The people entered last.

S.FORM: kas'aboe' rima' ila hao 'izo'.
S.TRANSL: 他們進去裡面。
They entered inside.

S.FORM: rima' sik noka hiza 'ima hara:i' mae'iyaeh noka samiyan koSa'en.
S.TRANSL: 骯髒的人告訴他們說，
The dirty man said to them,

S.FORM: so: rini' aboe' soks tasok soksok takahini takahini soksok.
S.TRANSL: 裡面要這樣鎖住。
Close it like this inside.

S.FORM: yako latar tasoksok iso'on 'inimon ila hao 'izo'.
S.TRANSL: 我要從外面把門反鎖；你們都在裡面。
I will lock you inside from outside; you will be inside.

S.FORM: o: So: mwa:i' ka mae'iyaeh koSa: haewaeh 'izi' ila i: haewaeh.
S.TRANSL: 若有人來，不要打開門。
If somebody comes, do not open it.

S.FORM: o: 'izi' 'atomal 'izi' haewaeh.
S.TRANSL: 不要打開門。
Don't open it.

S.FORM: a:h inaray isaza soksokon aboe' soksokon latar.
S.TRANSL: 船的裡面和外面都鎖住。
The boat was locked from inside and outside.

S.FORM: honaha:i' mwa:i' ila ka 'a'oeral.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後就下雨了。
It rained not long after that.

S.FORM: 'oeral ila sobaoeh ila ka 'a'oeral mwa:i' a ka ka 'a'oeral ni ka ka ka 'a'oeral sobae:oeh sobae:oeh ila naw.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後就下雨，雨越下越大。
It rained not long after that, and the rain got bigger.

S.FORM: hani ka ray 'asang ka mae'iyaeh mwa:i' ila 'oe'oe.
S.TRANSL: 村裡的鄰居都來了，他們呼喊著。
Neighbors in the village came and called.

S.FORM: koSa: haewaeh 'iniya'om ka palono' pakas'aboe' 'iniya'om.
S.TRANSL: 打開船；讓我們進去。
Open your boat; let us get in.

S.FORM: o: hao 'izo' 'oe'oe koSa:.
S.TRANSL: 裡面的人叫著。
Those inside called out.

S.FORM: mayso poa'aw ila.
S.TRANSL: 沒辦法打開。
There's no way.

S.FORM: o: hini rayno' ila haewaeh aboe'.
S.TRANSL: 哪裡有門可以打開？
Where is a door that can be opened?

S.FORM: ki latar soksok ila.
S.TRANSL: 船的裡面和外面都被鎖住了。
Both inside and outside were locked.

S.FORM: hani ka mae'iyaeh latar 'aroelon ila saboeh.
S.TRANSL: 外面的人都被外面的人都被沖走了。
The people outside were all flooded away.

S.FORM: nasia ka palono' toliyab ila ray ralom babaw isa: lasia 'aroe'aroelon ila 'aroelon 'aroe'aroelon rima'.
S.TRANSL: 船就漂浮在水中。
The boat floated on the water.

S.FORM: lasia paka:i' ila koSa sa'oewaz hini ka 'oemaeh hini ka mahinaw ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們就相信那個人講的話是真的。
They believed what the man had said were true.

S.FORM: 'ita' hini' 'izo' ray palono' kakoway ila hini.
S.TRANSL: 船的裡面在搖晃。
We inside the boat were rocking.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila i kita'i hani mita' sa:eng kakoway ila.
S.TRANSL: 船一搖晃，我們就坐下來。
We sat down as the boat started to move.

S.FORM: ka sia hiza ka palono' kik ra:ami hoenaehnge: ila nanaw mastalay ila ray 'oka' ila i kakoway o:.
S.TRANSL: 我們不知道發生什麼事了。船卡住了，不再動。
The boat, we did not know what happened. It got stuck. It's not moving anymore.

S.FORM: o: honaha:i' ila nanaw honaha:i' ila nanaw.
S.TRANSL: 過了不久，
After a while

S.FORM: ka lasia ma' 'okay haewaeh ka.
S.TRANSL: 他們沒有打開。
They did not open.

S.FORM: sahoeroe ka katesnenan.
S.TRANSL: （因為）他們找不到出口。
(since) they could not find a way out.

S.FORM: taz 'ima ila kayzaeh ila nanaw 'oka' ila o: naehaen ila kik kakoway hawaeh ila katesnenan.
S.TRANSL: 一切都平靜下來，船不再搖晃。他們就打開門。
Everything stabled. The boat was not rocking anymore. (They) opened the door.

S.FORM: rima' hawaeh Sa kita'en sa hini ka koko:ol nonak ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們就打開門。他們看到山都不一樣。
They opened (the door), and saw the mountains were not the same.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka hoerok 'oka' ila ka kaehoey 'oka' ila ka hinbetel.
S.TRANSL: 平地不再有；樹木不再有；草地不再有。
The flatland was not there. The trees were not there. The grassland was not there.

S.FORM: m kwakwasan ila.
S.TRANSL: 有發生山崩。
There had been a landslide.

S.FORM: lasia koSa: 'am kayzaeh ila.
S.TRANSL: 他們說一切都會很好。
They said everything would be all right.

S.FORM: kaka noka ka kas kakasrayan ka.
S.TRANSL: 要如何下去呢？
How do we get down?

S.FORM: o: sia 'am rima' ila matawaw.
S.TRANSL: 他就開始工作。
He went to work.

S.FORM: ki:im ila ka pazay.
S.TRANSL: 他就去找米。
He went to look for rice.

S.FORM: hawaeh hawaeh kasinpanan.
S.TRANSL: 他放所有的動物自由。
He set the animals free.

S.FORM: koSa: 'am mari' ila ka pazay tatokoeh ray 'oem'oemah.
S.TRANSL: 他們拿了米去種在土地上。
They took rice to plant on the land.

S.FORM: hawaeh soksok 'es'es atomalan.
S.TRANSL: 門緊緊地被鎖住。
The door was shut tight.

S.FORM: lasia mangowip ila ka paalowa'an mita' koSa ka noka samiyan koSa: o: hini ka 'am nak hini a hawaeh ka binsi'.
S.TRANSL: 他們已經忘記神的吩咐怎麼打開門。
The have forgotten how to open it as the gods have instructed them.

S.FORM: hinbetel pahaengal lasia sekela Sa hini kayzaeh ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠看到（船的裡面）。
The mice saw (the inside of the boat).

S.FORM: kakasrayan noka mae'iyaeh katokohan.
S.TRANSL: 草地上是他們可以下去的地方，在那裡種植。
The grassland is where they could get down and stay to do planting.

S.FORM: ka aewhaes si'ael ka 'i'ih ka balihaeh sanhowangen rima' si'ael ka pazay ki binsi'.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠在木頭上啃了一個洞，吃掉米和種子。
The mice gnawed a hole on the wood and ate the rice and seed.

S.FORM: 'am ra:iw ila nisia roSa' ka kinseman phangal noka sapang mae'iyaeh parayliz.
S.TRANSL: 他們正要離去的時候，掛著的兩袋米被抓走了。
When they were about to leave, the two bundles of rice hanging were grabbed away.

S.FORM: ta koSa: mari'in lasia parayliz mari'in sitokoh tokoh kita'en 'aehae' ho'ol 'aehae' bolasih 'in'alay zi'saza sia.
S.TRANSL: 被他們搶回來的稻種, 拿去播種之後, 發現有兩種, 一種是糯米, 一種是在來米。
They planted those millets that they took back. When those millets grew up, they found that there are two kinds: one is glutinous rice and the other Zai-lai rice.

S.FORM: ka maysosowaw haebae:aen ila ka mae'iyaeh.
S.TRANSL: 漸漸變很多人。
More and more people there were.

S.FORM: o: haebae:aen ila ka 'asang.
S.TRANSL: 村莊也很多。
More and more tribes there were.

S.FORM: hayza ila ka hapoy.
S.TRANSL: 火也有了。
There was fire.

S.FORM: hayza' ila ka ra:an.
S.TRANSL: 道路也有了。
There are roads.
